question: Who was the Seattle SuperSonics' head coach and team offensive rating in their final season (2007-08)?
notes: PLAN §12 row 2. team_off_rating is now sourced directly from src_fact_bref_team_season_summary.o_rtg (Basketball-Reference team-season summary, exact mirror of the per-team BBR page). The 2007-08 Seattle SuperSonics BBR team page shows ORtg = 100.5, which matches our src_fact_bref_team_season_summary row for team_id=1610612760, season_end_year=2008, playoffs=false. Prior implementation averaged fact_player_game_advanced.off_rating across Regular player-games and yielded 96.65 -- a player-game reconstruction that disagreed with the BBR team page (the canonical source). Coach: P.J. Carlesimo via fact_coach_season (20-62). Team abbreviation 'SEA' from dim_team_era (the Seattle/Seattle SuperSonics era valid 1996-2008).
